TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is a Space Wolves unit, until the end of the turn, it is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

Space Wolves|SAGA OF THE HUNTER.name: Saga of the Hunter
Space Wolves|SAGA OF THE HUNTER.rule_text:
Each time a model in a Space Wolves unit from your army makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit, if that enemy unit is within Engagement Range of one or more other Adeptus Astartes units from your army, or if the attacking unit contains more models than that enemy unit:
▪ Add 1 to the Hit roll.
▪ If your Saga is completed (see below), add 1 to the Wound roll as well.
Saga of the Hunter
At the start of the first battle round, your Quarry tally is 0. Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army fights, after all of those attacks have been resolved, add 1 to your Quarry tally for each enemy unit destroyed by those attacks.
Once your Quarry tally is equal to or greater than the number shown in the table below (depending on the battle size), your Saga is completed.
BATTLE SIZE - QUARRY TALLY
Incursion - 2
Strike Force - 3
Onslaught - 4

enhancements.name: Fenrisian Grit
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Feral Rage
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add an additional 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons.

enhancements.name: Swift Hunter
enhancements.description: Space Wolves model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 7" ability.

enhancements.name: Wolf Master
enhancements.description: Space Wolves model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly SPACE WOLVES unit within 9" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, teeth and claws and Tyrnak and Fenrir weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: Bounding Advance
stratagems.type: Saga of the Hunter - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
TARGET: One Space Wolves Infantry or Space Wolves Beasts unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declared a charge this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through models (excluding Titanic models). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but unless it is making a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.

stratagems.name: Chosen Prey
stratagems.type: Saga of the Hunter - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase, just after a Space Wolves unit from your army Falls Back.
TARGET: That SPACE WOLVES unit.
EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Hunters' Trail
stratagems.type: Saga of the Hunter - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One Space Wolves unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

stratagems.name: Marked for Destruction
stratagems.type: Saga of the Hunter - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: Two ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army (excluding Beasts) that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit visible to both of your units. Until the end of the phase, models in your units can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and each time a model in one of your units makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Onslaught
stratagems.type: Saga of the Hunter - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: Two ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, or one Space Wolves Beasts unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Territorial Advantage
stratagems.type: Saga of the Hunter - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit is destroyed by an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
TARGET: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit.
EFFECT: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Space Wolves|STORMLANCE TASK FORCE.name: Stormlance Task Force
Space Wolves|STORMLANCE TASK FORCE.rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Feinting Withdrawal
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Fury of the Storm
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearers melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Hunter's Instincts
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED model only. If the bearer's unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

enhancements.name: Portents of Wisdom
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.type: Stormlance Task Force - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Blitzing Fusillade
stratagems.type: Stormlance Task Force - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, until the end of the phase, that weapon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability as well.

stratagems.name: Full Throttle
stratagems.type: Stormlance Task Force - Wargear Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit (excluding WALKERS) from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is MOUNTED.

stratagems.name: Ride Hard, Ride Fast
stratagems.type: Stormlance Task Force - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Shock Assault
stratagems.type: Stormlance Task Force - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Charge phase.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for your unit and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Wind-Swift Evasion
stratagems.type: Stormlance Task Force - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
TARGET: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
EFFECT: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
RESTRICTIONS: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Space Wolves|SUBVERSION ASSETS.name: Subversion Assets
Space Wolves|SUBVERSION ASSETS.rule_text:
With transhuman instincts, auto-senses, and more specialised
equipment, a Chapter's masters of clandestine warfare are able to unmask the foe, leaving them ripe for swift eradication.
Friendly PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD units have the following ability:
Transhuman Perception: In your Shooting phase, this unit
can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is detected:
▪ While a unit is detected, that unit has +3" detection range.

enhancements.name: Death in the Dark
enhancements.description:
To slay the hidden foe where they lurk, where their deaths
go unmarked and unremembered, is to deny their hateful
lives meaning.
INFANTRY PHOBOS unit only. This unit's attacks that target a hidden unit have +1 to hit rolls.

enhancements.name: Shroud Field
enhancements.description:
This camouflaging field projector employs a chameleonic twisting of emissions whose secrets the Techmarines cannot reproduce. It mantles its bearer as if with a spectral shroud and masks his
approach to his doomed target.
PHOBOS model only. This model has:
▪ Lone Operative.
▪ Stealth.

stratagems.type: Subversion Assets Stratagem
stratagems.description:
Those warriors who operate far from Chapter reinforcement maintain their lethal fire even while conducting vital strategic operations.
WHEN: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit starts an action. TARGET: That PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit.
EFFECT: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

stratagems.name: Strike From the Shadows
stratagems.type: Subversion Assets Stratagem
stratagems.description:
Holding to the shadows and choosing victims with care, stealthy warriors winnow the enemy ranks without ever revealing their positions.
WHEN: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit has shot.
TARGET: That PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit. EFFECT: Those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.

stratagems.name: Cloaked Position
stratagems.type: Subversion Assets Stratagem
stratagems.description:
When still, silent and further masked by cameleoline materials or drifting smoke, a Chapter's forward operatives are almost impossible to spot until it is too late.
WHEN: Start of your opponent's Movement phase.
TARGET: One friendly unengaged PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit.
EFFECT: Your unit has -3" detection range until the end of the turn.

Space Wolves|VANGUARD SPEARHEAD.name: Vanguard Spearhead
Space Wolves|VANGUARD SPEARHEAD.rule_text: Each time a ranged attack targets an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll and the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Execute and Redeploy
enhancements.description: PHOBOS model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer's unit has shot, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge. This cannot allow the bearer's unit to move more than once in your Shooting phase.

enhancements.name: Ghostweave Cloak
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

enhancements.name: Shadow War Veteran
enhancements.description:
PHOBOS model only. Gain following ability:
Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

enhancements.name: The Blade Driven Deep
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

stratagems.name: A Deadly Prize
stratagems.type: Vanguard Spearhead - Wargear Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Start of the Command phase.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
EFFECT: That objective marker is said to be Sabotaged, and remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective marker is Sabotaged and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.type: Vanguard Spearhead - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Calculated Feint
stratagems.type: Vanguard Spearhead - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
EFFECT: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a PHOBOS or ScouT SQUAD unit.
RESTRICTIONS: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: Guerrilla Tactics
stratagems.type: Vanguard Spearhead - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
TARGET: Up to two PHOBOS and/or SCOUT SQUAD units from your army, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
EFFECT: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.
RESTRICTIONS: Each unit selected for this Stratagem must be more than 3" away from all enemy models.

stratagems.name: Strike From the Shadows
stratagems.type: Vanguard Spearhead - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is more than 12" away, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Surgical Strikes
stratagems.type: Vanguard Spearhead - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

Chaos Daemons|BLOOD LEGION.name: Blood Legion
Chaos Daemons|BLOOD LEGION.rule_text: Murdercall - In opponent's movement phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding Aircraft) ends a move within 8" of one or more Legiones Daemonica Khorne units, one of those units can make a surge move of up to D6". / Blood Tainted - At end of a phase in which a Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit destroyed an enemy unit within range of an objective marker at phase start, if your unit has higher Level of Control, that objective marker remains under your control until opponent's Level of Control is greater at end of a phase.

enhancements.name: Brazenmaw
enhancements.description: Brazenmaw (Khorne, +2 to Charge rolls)

enhancements.name: Fury's Cage
enhancements.description: Fury's Cage (Khorne Monster, take D3+1 mortal wounds to re-roll all Hit and Wound rolls until end of phase)

enhancements.name: Gateway Unto Damnation
enhancements.description: Gateway unto Damnation (Khorne Monster, Deadly Demise triggers on 2+

enhancements.name: Slaughterthirst
enhancements.description: Slaughterthirst (Aura) (Khorne, LANCE on weapons for friendly non-Monster Khorne units within 6")

stratagems.name: Blood Begets Skulls
stratagems.type: Blood Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Charge phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army that has not been selected to charge this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Fools' Flight
stratagems.type: Blood Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit.
EFFECT: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge. Note that even if that charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

stratagems.name: Gore-Hungry Onslaught
stratagems.type: Blood Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Sheathed in Brass
stratagems.type: Blood Legion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a Save characteristic of 3+.

stratagems.name: Skulls Beget Blood
stratagems.type: Blood Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne Infantry or Legiones Daemonica Khorne Mounted unit from your army (excluding units that Fell Back this turn) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Wrath Undeniable
stratagems.type: Blood Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Khorne unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Chaos Daemons|CAVALCADE OF CHAOS.name: Cavalcade of Chaos
Chaos Daemons|CAVALCADE OF CHAOS.rule_text: Unholy Avalanche - If a Legiones Daemonica Mounted unit made a Fall Back move this turn, that move does not prevent it from shooting or charging.

Chaos Daemons|DAEMONIC INCURSION.name: Daemonic Incursion
Chaos Daemons|DAEMONIC INCURSION.rule_text: Warp Rifts - Each time a Legiones Daemonica unit uses Deep Strike, if set up wholly within your Shadow of Chaos and/or within 6" of a friendly Bloodthirster, Great Unclean One, Kairos Fateweaver, Keeper of Secrets, Lord of Change, Rotigus, Shalaxi Helbane, or Skarbrand unit sharing a god keyword, can be set up more than 6" from enemy models instead of 8".

enhancements.name: A'rgath, The King of Blades
enhancements.description: A'rgath, the King of Blades (Khorne, melee weapon buffs)

enhancements.name: Soulstealer
enhancements.description: Soulstealer (Slaanesh, regain wounds on kill)

enhancements.name: The Endless Gift
enhancements.description: The Endless Gift (Nurgle, FNP 5+)

enhancements.name: The Everstave
enhancements.description: The Everstave (Tzeentch, ranged weapon buffs)

stratagems.name: Corrupt Realspace
stratagems.type: Demonic Incursion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Start of any Command phase.
TARGET: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
EFFECT: That objective marker is said to be Corrupted and remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. In addition, while an objective marker is Corrupted and under your control, the area of the battlefield within 6" of that objective marker is considered to be within your army's Shadow of Chaos.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Invulnerability
stratagems.type: Demonic Incursion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of that enemy unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an invulnerable saving throw is made for a model in your unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

stratagems.name: Denizens of the Warp
stratagems.type: Demonic Incursion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase.
TARGET: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
EFFECT: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

stratagems.name: Draught of Terror
stratagems.type: Demonic Incursion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
TARGET: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1. In addition, until the end of the phase, each time such a weapon targets a unit that is Battle-shocked, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: The Realm of Chaos
stratagems.type: Demonic Incursion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: End of your opponent's turn.
TARGET: Up to two LEGIONES DAEMONICA units from your army that are within your army's Shadow of Chaos, or one other LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army.
EFFECT: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. They will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.
RESTRICTIONS: You cannot target units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units with this Stratagem.

stratagems.name: Warp Surge
stratagems.type: Demonic Incursion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Charge phase.
TARGET: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit from your army that is within your army's Shadow of Chaos.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Chaos Daemons|LEGION OF EXCESS.name: Legion of Excess
Chaos Daemons|LEGION OF EXCESS.rule_text: Beguiling Aura - Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh units are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back. / Seductive Gambit - Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh units: each time this unit ends a Charge move, can declare it will perform a Seductive Gambit. If so, until end of turn, this unit does not have Fights First, but each time a model makes an attack, can re-roll Hit roll and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Avatar of Perfection
enhancements.description: Avatar of Perfection (Slaanesh Monster, if no other friendly units within 6" at start of phase: re-roll Advance rolls, re-roll Charge rolls, ignore modifiers to Move/Advance/Charge)

enhancements.name: Dreaming Crown
enhancements.description: Dreaming Crown (Aura) (Slaanesh, same units add 1 to Hit rolls for melee attacks)

enhancements.name: False Majesty
enhancements.description: False Majesty (Aura) (Slaanesh, friendly Slaanesh non-Monster units within 6" add 1 to Wound rolls for melee attacks)

enhancements.name: Soul Glutton
enhancements.description: Soul Glutton (Slaanesh Monster, at end of Fight phase, if one or more enemy models destroyed by bearer's attacks, regain up to D3 lost wounds)

stratagems.name: Archagonists
stratagems.type: Legion of Excess - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh Monster unit or up to two Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh units (excluding Monsters) from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of those units makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Cavalcade of Blades
stratagems.type: Legion of Excess - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit from your army ends a Charge move.
TARGET: That LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, or roll six D6 instead if your unit is a MONSTER unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Excess
stratagems.type: Legion of Excess - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Phantasmal Longing
stratagems.type: Legion of Excess - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Sensory Excruciation
stratagems.type: Legion of Excess - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh Monster unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
EFFECT: Each unit on the battlefield that is within your army's Shadow of Chaos must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if they are Below Half-strength.
Designer's Note: This Stratagem forces all friendly and enemy units alike within your army's Shadow of Chaos to take a Battle-shock test. This can allow a Chaos Daemons player to heal units from their army through the Daemonic Terror army rule, at the risk of causing some of their own units to become Battle-shocked.

stratagems.name: Thieves of Pain
stratagems.type: Legion of Excess - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase, just after an attack or mortal wound is allocated to a model in a Legiones Daemonica Slaanesh unit from your army (excluding Monsters and Vehicles).
TARGET: That LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit.
EFFECT: Select one other friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit that is within 9" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, while the selected unit is on the battlefield, each time a model in your unit would lose a wound, inflict 1 mortal wound on the selected unit instead.

Chaos Daemons|LORDS OF THE WARP.name: Lords of the Warp
Chaos Daemons|LORDS OF THE WARP.rule_text: Loci of Power - Friendly Legiones Daemonica Character models (excluding Monster) have +1 LD and OC.

Chaos Daemons|PLAGUE LEGION.name: Plague Legion
Chaos Daemons|PLAGUE LEGION.rule_text: Melancholic Miasma - While an enemy unit is within 9" of one or more Legiones Daemonica Nurgle units, that enemy unit is within your Shadow of Chaos. In each player's Command phase, select one enemy unit within your Shadow of Chaos; that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Cankerblight
enhancements.description: Cankerblight (Aura) (Nurgle, each time an enemy non-Monster/Vehicle unit within 6" fails a Battle-shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed

enhancements.name: Droning Shroud
enhancements.description: Droning Shroud (Aura) (Nurgle Monster, friendly Nurgle units within 6" can only be targeted by ranged attacks if attacker is within 18")

enhancements.name: Font of Spores
enhancements.description: Font of Spores (Aura) (Nurgle Monster, friendly Nurgle units within 6" improve AP of weapons by 1)

enhancements.name: Maggot Maws
enhancements.description: Maggot Maws (Nurgle, in Shooting phase select enemy unit within 6": Battle-shock test, then roll D6 - on 3+, D3 mortal wounds

stratagems.name: Fever Visions
stratagems.type: Plague Legion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. After your unit has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Foetid Resurgence
stratagems.type: Plague Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
EFFECT: Return up to 1 destroyed model to your unit, or up to D3 destroyed models instead if your unit is a Battleline unit, with their full wounds remaining. If it is a Monster unit, one model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds instead.

stratagems.name: Murkshadows
stratagems.type: Plague Legion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle Infantry unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal move, add 5" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Plague of Woes
stratagems.type: Plague Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Command phase, before selecting any targets for the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, after an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test as a result of the Melancholic Miasma Detachment rule, select one other enemy unit within 9" of your unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Rot and Renewal
stratagems.type: Plague Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Seeping Virulence
stratagems.type: Plague Legion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Nurgle unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Chaos Daemons|SCINTILLATING LEGION.name: Scintillating Legion
Chaos Daemons|SCINTILLATING LEGION.rule_text: Fates in Flux - Start with 3 Flux tokens (track with a die). Spend 1 Flux token after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll, Damage roll, saving throw, or Hazardous test for a Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch model/unit to re-roll that result; when you spend, reduce your tokens by 1 and opponent gains 1. Whenever opponent has 1+ tokens, they can spend 1 after a similar roll for their own model/unit; same transfer. In your Command phase, if opponent has 1+ tokens, you gain 1 token.

enhancements.name: Improbable Shield
enhancements.description: Improbable Shield (Aura) (Tzeentch, FNP 4+ against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds for friendly Tzeentch units within 6")

enhancements.name: Inescapable Eye
enhancements.description: Inescapable Eye (Tzeentch, gain 1 extra Flux token in Command phase if opponent has any)

enhancements.name: Infernal Puppeteer
enhancements.description: Infernal Puppeteer (Tzeentch Monster, Shooting phase: measure range/visibility from another friendly Tzeentch unit within 9")

enhancements.name: Neverblade
enhancements.description: Neverblade (Tzeentch Monster, +2S, +1A, +1AP on melee weapons, +1 Hit roll)

stratagems.name: Delirium Unmade
stratagems.type: Scintillating Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. Alternatively, you can spend one Flux token when you use this Stratagem and target up to two LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH units from your army instead (including those within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units).
EFFECT: Remove your units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Fateborne Nightmares
stratagems.type: Scintillating Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Ficklefire
stratagems.type: Scintillating Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets for, and resolving attacks with, ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model is destroyed while its unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

stratagems.name: Flickering Reality
stratagems.type: Scintillating Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Roll one D6, then you can spend one Flux token to re-roll the result: until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll (after any re-roll) of that result, the attack sequence ends, even if the original Hit roll would have been a Critical Hit.
Example: If you roll a 2 and choose to spend one Flux token to re-roll the result, and the re-roll is a 6, then until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll of 6 the attack sequence ends, that attack fails to hit and no Critical Hit effects (e.g. Lethal Hits) are resolved.

stratagems.name: Impossible Eclipse
stratagems.type: Scintillating Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch Monster unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
EFFECT: Select No Man's Land or your opponent's deployment zone, or spend one Flux token and select both. Until the end of the phase, the selected areas of the battlefield are within your army's Shadow of Chaos.

stratagems.name: Pyrogenesis
stratagems.type: Scintillating Legion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
TARGET: One Legiones Daemonica Tzeentch unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight that phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in your unit, or spend one Flux token and add 3 to the Strength characteristic of those weapons and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 instead.

Chaos Daemons|SHADOW LEGION.name: Shadow Legion
Chaos Daemons|SHADOW LEGION.rule_text:
First Prince of Chaos - Be'lakor must be included; all other Daemon Princes and Epic Heroes (excluding Be'lakor) are banned. Heretic Astartes allies allowed up to: 500pts (Incursion) / 1000pts (Strike Force) / 1500pts (Onslaught). God-keyword abilities per unit: Khorne (Murderer's Cowl), Tzeentch (Penumbral Puppetry), Nurgle (Gloam Rot), Slaanesh (Shadow's Caress), Undivided (Disciples of Be'lakor - includes Dark Pacts and Deep Strike for Heretic Astartes models).
Keywords: Be'lakor and Heretic Astartes gain Shadow Legion + Undivided. Legiones Daemonica units gain Shadow Legion.

enhancements.name: Fade to Darkness
enhancements.description: Fade to Darkness

enhancements.name: Leaping Shadows
enhancements.description: Leaping Shadows

enhancements.name: Malice Made Manifest
enhancements.description: Malice Made Manifest

enhancements.name: Mantle of Gloom
enhancements.description: Mantle of Gloom (Aura)

stratagems.name: Binding Shadow
stratagems.type: Shadow Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
TARGET: Up to one Shadow Legion Heretic Astartes unit from your army and up to one Shadow Legion Legiones Daemonica unit from your army. You can only select units that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
EFFECT: Remove those selected units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Channelled Wrath
stratagems.type: Shadow Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One Shadow Legion unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit has the Khorne keyword, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: Death Denied
stratagems.type: Shadow Legion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: One Shadow Legion unit from your army.
EFFECT: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, If your unit has the Tzeentch keyword, return up to one destroyed model (excluding Character models) to your unit with its full wounds remaining.

stratagems.name: Encroaching Darkness
stratagems.type: Shadow Legion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: Up to one Shadow Legion Heretic Astartes unit from your army and up to one Shadow Legion Legiones Daemonica unit from your army. You can only select units that arrived from Reserves this turn.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your selected units have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

stratagems.name: Shade Path
stratagems.type: Shadow Legion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
TARGET: One Shadow Legion unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit. In addition, if your unit has the Nurgle keyword, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Spiteful Demise
stratagems.type: Shadow Legion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase, just after a Shadow Legion unit from your army is destroyed, before removing the last model in that unit from the battlefield and before rolling any dice for the Deadly Demise ability.
TARGET: That SHADOW LEGION unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
EFFECT: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of the last model in your unit, adding 2 to the result if your unit has the Slaanesh keyword: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

Chaos Daemons|WARPTIDE.name: Warptide
Chaos Daemons|WARPTIDE.rule_text: Shudderblînk - When a Legiones Daemonica Battleline unit is selected to Advance: its ranged attacks have ASSAULT until end of turn; the Advance move does not prevent it from declaring a charge.

Death Guard|CHAMPIONS OF CONTAGION.name: Champions of Contagion
Death Guard|CHAMPIONS OF CONTAGION.rule_text: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle's Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.

enhancements.name: Cornucophagus
enhancements.description: Lord of Poxes only. In the Declare Battle Formations step select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of the bearer, that enemy unit has the effect of that Plague in addition to any other.

enhancements.name: Final Ingredient
enhancements.description: Biologus Putrifier only. Once per battle, after the bearers unit has fought, if one or more CHARACTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is Afflicted, that unit has the effect of the selected Plague in addition to any other.

enhancements.name: Needle of Nurgle
enhancements.description: Plague Surgeon only. Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer's unit (instead of 1).

enhancements.name: Visions of Virulence
enhancements.description: Malignant Plaguecaster only. While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer's Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.

stratagems.name: Blessings of Filth
stratagems.type: Champions of Contagion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Death's Heads
stratagems.type: Champions of Contagion - Wargear Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Biologus Putrifier unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit (excluding VEHICLES) that is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit has the effect of all Plagues (see Nurgle's Gift).

stratagems.name: Grotesque Fortitude
stratagems.type: Champions of Contagion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Death Guard Attached unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Malignance Magnified
stratagems.type: Champions of Contagion - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Mobile Vector
stratagems.type: Champions of Contagion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.
TARGET: One Death Guard Character unit from your army that is not leading a unit.
EFFECT: Select one other friendly Death Guard unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and Attached units that already have two Leader units or one of your CHARACTER units leading it] within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your unit that your unit can lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet]. Your unit attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit's Starting Strength accordingly.

stratagems.name: Rabid Infusion
stratagems.type: Champions of Contagion - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Start of the Fight phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard unit from your army that includes two Character models.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

Death Guard|DEATH LORD'S CHOSEN.name: Death Lord's Chosen
Death Guard|DEATH LORD'S CHOSEN.rule_text: In your opponent's Command phase, roll 2D6 for each Afflicted enemy unit, subtracting 1 from the result if that unit is Below Half-strength. If the result is 6 or less, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Face of Death
enhancements.description: Terminator model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Helm of The Fly King
enhancements.description: Terminator model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Vile Vigour
enhancements.description: Terminator model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Warprot Talisman
enhancements.description: Terminator model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: Blooming Pestilence
stratagems.type: Death Lord's Chosen - Epic Deed Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Start of any phase.
TARGET: One Terminator unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Grim Reapers
stratagems.type: Death Lord's Chosen - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One Terminator unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Mortarion's Teachings
stratagems.type: Death Lord's Chosen - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Terminator unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [HEAVY] abilities.

stratagems.name: Sickening Impact
stratagems.type: Death Lord's Chosen - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a Terminator unit from your army ends a Charge move.
TARGET: That TERMINATOR unit.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: Signal Pox
stratagems.type: Death Lord's Chosen - Epic Deed Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: One Lord of Virulence model from your army.
EFFECT: Select one objective marker within 30" of and visible to your model. Until the start of your next turn, while an enemy unit is within range of that objective marker, that unit is Afflicted.

stratagems.name: Undying Spite
stratagems.type: Death Lord's Chosen - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Terminator unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Death Guard|FLYBLOWN HOST.name: Flyblown Host
Death Guard|FLYBLOWN HOST.rule_text: Death Guard Infantry units (excluding Poxwalkers units) from your army that are not embarked within a Transport have the Scouts 5" and Stealth abilities.

enhancements.name: Insectile Murmuration
enhancements.description: Death Guard Infantry model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is within Contagion Range of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Plagueveil
enhancements.description: Death Guard Infantry model only. While the bearer's unit is within range of one or more objective markers that you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

stratagems.name: Droning Horror
stratagems.type: Flyblown Host - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit within half range, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: Enervating Onslaught
stratagems.type: Flyblown Host - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army makes a Charge move.
TARGET: That Death Guard Infantry unit.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES). Roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that unit, adding 1 to the result if that model is not a Cultist or Poxwalker model: for each 5+, the selected enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: Eye of the Swarm
stratagems.type: Flyblown Host - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding Blast weapons) have the [PISTOL] ability.

stratagems.name: Myphitic Invigoration
stratagems.type: Flyblown Host - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more friendly Myphitic Blight-hauler units and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Nauseating Paroxysms
stratagems.type: Flyblown Host - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Start of the Fight phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

stratagems.name: Vermin Cloud
stratagems.type: Flyblown Host - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

Death Guard|MORTARION'S HAMMER.name: Mortarion's Hammer
Death Guard|MORTARION'S HAMMER.rule_text:
At the start of the battle round, select a number of enemy units more than 12" away from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are Afflicted. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below.
BATTLE SIZE - UNITS
Incursion - 1
Strike Force - 2
Onslaught - 3

enhancements.name: Bilemaw Blight
enhancements.description: Malignant Plaguecaster only. At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon.

enhancements.name: Eye of Affliction
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the [ignores cover] ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.

enhancements.name: Shriekworm Familiar
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Tendrilous Emissions
enhancements.description: Lord of Virulence only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly Death Guard Vehicle units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those VEHICLE units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Blighted Land
stratagems.type: Mortarion's Hammer - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: End of your Movement phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Vehicle unit from your army.
EFFECT: Select one terrain feature within 24" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, enemy units are Afflicted while they are within 3" of that terrain feature.

stratagems.name: Drawn to Despair
stratagems.type: Mortarion's Hammer - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) within your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Eyestinger Storm
stratagems.type: Mortarion's Hammer - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Command phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Vehicle unit from your army.
EFFECT: Select one objective marker visible to one or more models in your unit. Each Afflicted enemy unit within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Font of Filth
stratagems.type: Mortarion's Hammer - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: Relentless Grind
stratagems.type: Mortarion's Hammer - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Stinking Mire
stratagems.type: Mortarion's Hammer - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Vehicle unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

Death Guard|SHAMBLEROT VECTORIUM.name: Shamblerot Vectorium
Death Guard|SHAMBLEROT VECTORIUM.rule_text:
In your Command phase in each of the following battle rounds, depending on your chosen battle size, add a new Poxwalkers unit with a Starting Strength of 10 to your army, in Strategic Reserves.
BATTLE SIZE - BATTLE ROUNDS
Incursion - 2,3
Strike Force - 2, 3, 4
Onslaught - 2, 3, 4, 5
KEYWORDS
POXWALKERS units from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

enhancements.name: Lord of the Walking Pox
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. If the bearer is leading a Poxwalker unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

enhancements.name: Sorrowsyphon
enhancements.description: Malignant Plaguecaster only. While the bearer is leading a Poxwalkers unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer's unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer's unit are destroyed.

enhancements.name: Talisman of Burgeoning
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of Poxwalkers models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Witherbone Pipes
enhancements.description: Noxious Blightbringer only. While the bearer is leading a Poxwalkers unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

stratagems.name: Gnawing Hunger
stratagems.type: Shamblerot Vectorium - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: One Poxwalkers unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, and add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

stratagems.name: Grip of the Walking Pox
stratagems.type: Shamblerot Vectorium - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Poxwalkers unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: After the attacking unit has fought, roll one D6 for each model from your unit that was destroyed as a result of those attacks: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If your unit is not destroyed after the attacking unit has fought, enemy models destroyed as a result of this Stratagem count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a model in your unit for the purposes of the Curse of the Walking Pox ability.

stratagems.name: Hidden Amongst the Dead
stratagems.type: Shamblerot Vectorium - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
TARGET: One Poxwalkers unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves and that is not an Attached unit.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Shambling Wall
stratagems.type: Shamblerot Vectorium - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Death Guard unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks, and one friendly Poxwalkers unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time you would allocate an attack to a model in your DEATH GUARD unit, if your POXWALKERS unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no saving throw is made for that attack; instead a number of POXWALKERS from your POXWALKERS unit equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack are destroyed.

stratagems.name: Shock and Horror
stratagems.type: Shamblerot Vectorium - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a Death Guard unit from your army ends a Charge move.
TARGET: That DEATH GUARD unit.
EFFECT: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

stratagems.name: Smeared with Filth
stratagems.type: Shamblerot Vectorium - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One Poxwalkers unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit that made one or more attacks that targeted your unit this phase. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

Death Guard|TALLYBAND SUMMONERS.name: Tallyband Summoners
Death Guard|TALLYBAND SUMMONERS.rule_text:
While a Plague Legions unit from your army is within 7" of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, that PLAGUE LEGIONS unit has the Nurgle's Gift ability.
While a Death Guard unit from your army is within 7" of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, add 3" to that DEATH GUARD units Contagion Range.
PLAGUE LEGIONS
You can include Plague Legions units in your army, even though they do not have the DEATH GUARD Faction keyword. The combined points cost of such units you can include in your army is:
▪ Incursion: Up to 500 pts
▪ Strike Force: Up to 1000 pts
▪ Onslaught: Up to 1500 pts
No PLAGUE LEGIONS models from your army can be your WARLORD.

enhancements.name: Beckoning Blight
enhancements.description: Death Guard model only. Each time a Plague Legions unit from your army is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within 12" of the bearer, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, instead of more than 9".

enhancements.name: Entropic Knell
enhancements.description: Great Unclean One only. In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

enhancements.name: Fell Harvester
enhancements.description: Death Guard model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Tome of Bounteous Blessings
enhancements.description: Malignant Plaguecaster only. Each time a Plague Legions unit within 12" of the bearer takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a Battleline unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).

stratagems.name: All Is Rot
stratagems.type: Tallyband Summoners - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Plague Legions unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model's unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

stratagems.name: Avatars of Decay
stratagems.type: Tallyband Summoners - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Plague Legions unit from your army.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

stratagems.name: Clutching Corruption
stratagems.type: Tallyband Summoners - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more Plague Legions units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Fleshy Avalanche
stratagems.type: Tallyband Summoners - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
TARGET: One Plague Legions Monster unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

stratagems.name: Mireslick
stratagems.type: Tallyband Summoners - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
TARGET: One Plague Legions unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

stratagems.name: Persistent Pests
stratagems.type: Tallyband Summoners - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase.
TARGET: One Nurglings unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
EFFECT: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with its full wounds remaining.
RESTRICTIONS: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

Death Guard|VIRULENT VECTORIUM.name: Virulent Vectorium
Death Guard|VIRULENT VECTORIUM.rule_text: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and a Death Guard unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Nurgle's Gift ability as if it were a DEATH GUARD model from your army.

enhancements.name: Arch Contaminator
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. While the bearer's unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Daemon Weapon of Nurgle
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Furnace of Plagues
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearers melee weapons, and the bearer's melee weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

enhancements.name: Revolting Regeneration
enhancements.description: DEATH GUARD model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

stratagems.name: Creeping Blight
stratagems.type: Virulent Vectorium - Wargear Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Disgustingly Resilient
stratagems.type: Virulent Vectorium - Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
TARGET: One Death Guard unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Leechspore Eruption
stratagems.type: Virulent Vectorium - Epic Deed Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard model your army that has lost one or more wounds.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit within 3" of your model. Roll a number of D6 equal to the number of wounds your model has lost: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers one mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds) and your model regains 1 lost wound (to a maximum of 6 lost wounds).

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Generosity
stratagems.type: Virulent Vectorium - Wargear Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Start of your Shooting phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Character unit from your army.
EFFECT: Select one enemy unit visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a DEATH GUARD unit from your army selects that enemy unit as the target of any ranged attacks, you can re-roll the dice to determine how many attacks a weapon equipped by a model in that unit makes.

stratagems.name: Plaguesurge
stratagems.type: Virulent Vectorium - Epic Deed Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Command phase.
TARGET: Your Death Guard WARLORD that is on the battlefield.
EFFECT: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models from your army.

stratagems.name: Putrid Detonation
stratagems.type: Virulent Vectorium - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase.
TARGET: One Death Guard Vehicle or Death Guard Monster model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
EFFECT: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model's Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted. In addition, any enemy units that suffer mortal wounds as a result of this Stratagem are Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

Space Wolves: Space Wolves|LEGENDS OF SAGA AND SONG
Space Wolves|SAGA OF THE GREAT WOLF
